basic_details.job_title: RMC Panel Advocate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Rajkot Municipal Corporation (RMC) Panel Advocate Notification 2026 has been released on 29 June 2026 on the official website of RMC. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the RMC Panel Advocate Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Valid Sanad as Advocate, Minimum 10 years experience in local court cases (Civil, Criminal, District, Sessions Court excluding Labour Court)
qualification.details: Valid Sanad as Advocate Minimum 10 years experience in local court cases (Civil, Criminal, District, Sessions Court excluding Labour Court)

selection_process: Application Scrutiny Merit-based Selection by Commissioner
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for RMC Panel Advocate Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.rmc.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: RMC Panel Advocate Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the RMC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for RMC Panel Advocate Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.rmc.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: RMC Panel Advocate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for RMC Panel Advocate Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for receipt of the application form for RMC Panel Advocate Recruitment 2026 is 31st July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there for Panel Advocate posts in RMC?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy announced for the Panel Advocate post in the Rajkot Municipal Corporation (RMC) recruitment drive. This is for the local court in Rajkot.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for RMC Panel Advocate jobs?
faq.answer: The application mode for the RMC Panel Advocate recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website, fill it, and send it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the required qualification for the Panel Advocate post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a valid Sanad as an Advocate and have a minimum of 10 years of experience in local court cases, excluding labour court cases, to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for RMC Panel Advocate Recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the RMC Panel Advocate Recruitment 2026. Candidates can apply free of cost.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for Panel Advocate in RMC?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Panel Advocate position in RMC involves application scrutiny followed by a merit-based selection conducted by the Commissioner. Eligible candidates will be chosen based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I download the application form for RMC Panel Advocate?
faq.answer: The application form for the RMC Panel Advocate recruitment can be downloaded from the official website of Rajkot Municipal Corporation, which is www.rmc.gov.in. Ensure to check the latest notification for the direct link.

faq.question: Q8. What is the official website of Rajkot Municipal Corporation?
faq.answer: The official website for Rajkot Municipal Corporation is www.rmc.gov.in. Candidates can visit this website for official notifications, application forms, and other relevant updates regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for the Panel Advocate position?
faq.answer: The Panel Advocate position at Rajkot Municipal Corporation is a contractual job type. This means the engagement will be for a specific period as outlined in the official recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q10. What experience is required for the Panel Advocate role?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for the Panel Advocate role must have a minimum of 10 years of experience in handling local court cases. This experience should be in Civil, Criminal, District, and Sessions Courts, specifically excluding Labour Court cases.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for RMC Panel Advocate Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for receipt of the application form for RMC Panel Advocate Recruitment 2026 is 31st July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.
